title: cyanthillium cinereum var. montanum
intro: Cyanthillium cinereum var. montanum, also known as the Yellow Bur Marigold, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyanthillium cinereum var. montanum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
